---
name: Feature request
about: Something meshmcp should do — a verb, a policy capability, an integration
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that you can't today? The workflow matters more
than the mechanism — "I need a second operator to approve pairings from her
laptop" beats "add a flag". -->

## What you'd expect to run

```console
$ meshmcp …
```

## Security posture

<!-- meshmcp is deny-by-default: who should be ALLOWED to use this, and what
identity/audit trail should it leave? A feature with no answer here usually
needs one before it can ship. -->
